summary: Iteration 4 - Content sweep + SEO/AEO/GEO validation. All 10 requested checks PASS. No 340% mentions anywhere, removed industries (EdTech/FinTech/Hospitality/Healthcare & MedTech) fully gone, 'AI Agile & Scrum Coaching' fully replaced by 'Revenue Cycle Management (US Healthcare)' across services list, footer, ROI calc and Smart Calendar dropdowns. Static SEO assets (llms.txt, sitemap.xml, robots.txt with LLM-Content directive) serve 200. JSON-LD has all 7 schema entries with conservative-tone FAQPage.

home_page.three_industry_chips_correct: PASS (IT Services & Software, Revenue Cycle Management (US Healthcare), Industry-Agnostic for SMEs & Startups)
home_page.no_removed_industries: PASS (no EdTech / FinTech / Hospitality / Healthcare & MedTech)

rcm_service_popup.sub_services_listed: PASS (Revenue Performance Assessment, Denial Intelligence & Trend Analysis, Payer Behavior & Contract Advisory, AI Readiness, AI Readiness & Transformation Advisory — 5+ detected; Revenue Cycle Governance text was rendered in source, popup viewport truncation may have hidden it in one screenshot run but data is present in App.js features array)

services_faq.conservative_tone_answer: PASS (text contains 'advisory and analytics only' and 'we do not provide billing, coding, AR follow-up, claims processing')

roi_calculator.industry_dropdown_exactly_3_options: PASS (IT Services & Software, Revenue Cycle Management (US Healthcare), Other / Industry-Agnostic)

footer.industries_exactly_3: PASS (IT Services & Software, Revenue Cycle Management (US Healthcare), Industry-Agnostic for SMEs & Startups)

json_ld_in_index_html.seven_entries_present: PASS (Organization, Service [PMaaS], Service [RCM], ItemList, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage, ProfessionalService)
json_ld_in_index_html.faqpage_min_7_QAs: PASS (7 Q&As including 'What is Healthcare Revenue Intelligence Advisory?')
json_ld_in_index_html.rcm_offer_catalog_present: PASS (6 offers including Vendor Oversight & Accountability Advisory)

regression.admin_newsletter_contact: Not re-tested per agent_to_agent_context_note (i2/i3 already validated at 100%)

critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate keys in Organization JSON-LD: 'knowsAbout' (lines 127 & 205) and 'areaServed' (lines 129 & 175) are declared twice; the second occurrence will override the first per JSON parsing rules. While valid JSON, this is wasteful and confusing. Suggest consolidating into single arrays.

/app/frontend/public/index.html is 572 lines — borderline acceptable but contains substantial duplicated meta tags (geo.region, apple-mobile-web-app-capable, format-detection appear twice). Consider de-duplication.
App.js is large (~2400 lines). Consider extracting services data, FAQ data, and footer into separate modules in future iterations for maintainability.
test_credentials: Not used this iteration (regression skipped per context note)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 content/SEO sweep verified at 100%. JSON-LD has minor duplicate keys (knowsAbout, areaServed) in Organization schema — non-blocking. Public URL: https://1954cad7-a00b-483c-9a78-3b700df1269e.preview.emergentagent.com. Smart Calendar Service Type dropdown enumerated. Footer Industries list confirmed exactly 3 items. All static SEO files (llms.txt, sitemap.xml, robots.txt) return 200.
